description: A vibrant watercolor depicting a beach scene with colorful figures gathered on rocks and sand by the water. Women and children in bright clothing — blue, red, orange — sit and stand in groups along the shore. A child plays with a toy sailboat in the water in the foreground. Parasols add splashes of color. The sky is painted in broad, loose strokes of blue and yellow. The overall effect is festive and sun-drenched, rendered in the characteristic mosaic-like brushwork of Post-Impressionism.
